The artifact type panel work is already present and the focused Vitest slice passes, but the required full frontend gate `bun run test` fails in an unrelated existing spec: `src/lib/components/D3Graph.contrast.spec.ts` still asserts that `D3Graph.svelte` must not contain `stroke-opacity`, while the current component source still includes `.attr('stroke-opacity', 0.9)`. I did not change that file because it is outside the bead scope. What I verified: - `bun run test:unit -- --run src/lib/artifactTypePanel.test.ts` passes in `cli/internal/server/frontend`. - `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/ArtifactTypePanel.svelte` exists and is already integrated into `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/artifacts/[artifactId]/+page.svelte`. - The component imports `prefixOf` from `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/artifacts/grouping.ts`. Follow-up needed: - Investigate or triage the unrelated `D3Graph.contrast.spec.ts` failure before rerunning `bun run test` and `lefthook run pre-commit`.
